reference: Dear Sir, I have experienced sweating and some uneasiness on a few occasions in the last two-three months. On investigations, the electrocardiogram has shown variations. However, I was able to withstand the treadmill test for about seven-eight minutes. When I experience the above symptoms, my pulse rate goes up to about ninety-five-one hundred. The blood pressure is about ninety-five-ninety-seven on the lower side and one hundred and forty-five-one hundred and fifty on the higher side. After some time, it returns. The pulse rate falls back to about seventy, and the blood pressure also ranges back to eighty-five-one hundred and twenty-five or so. I do not take any medications for blood pressure. The sweating usually occurs at night, sometimes late in my sleep at two:thirty AM or even four:zero AM. Please advise.
text: Dear Sir, I have experienced sweating and some uneasiness on a few occasions in the last two three months. On investigations, the electrocardiogram has shown variations. However, I was able to withstand the treadmill test for about seven eight minutes. When I experience the above symptoms, my pulse rate goes up to about ninety five one hundred. The blood pressure is about ninety five ninety seven on the lower side, a one hundred and forty five one hundred and fifty on the higher side. After some time, it returns. The pulse rate falls back to about seventy, and the blood pressure also ranges back to eighty five one hundred and twenty five or so. I do not take any medications for blood pressure. The sweating usually occurs at nights, sometimes late in my sleep at two thirty a.m. or even four zero a.m. Please advise.
